response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned polyglot engineer with genuine distributed-systems credentials (Sociomantic's million-RPS pipeline) and solid craftsmanship values, but the resume contains no evidence of the core competencies this role is built around: experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, or growth/funnel engineering. The Principal/IC6 bar also implies cross-org technical leadership and measurable influence at scale, which is not demonstrated. His recent work at re:cinq on AI-agent tooling is interesting but orthogonal to the growth-and-measurement focus of the position.
strengths: 20+ years of polyglot engineering covering C/C++, TypeScript, Java, and DLang, meeting the language breadth requirement
Proven high-throughput distributed systems work at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/second, async I/O, low-latency pipelines)
Strong engineering-craft foundation: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source contributions, and community teaching
concerns: Zero mention of experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout automation — the central technical domain of the role
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis experience visible anywhere in the resume
No evidence of Principal-level cross-team technical leadership, multi-workstream ownership, or data-science/product partnership at enterprise scale

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
Strong distributed systems and polyglot engineering depth
